D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

RGB ↔ XYZ Matrices

slide the primaries and switch RGB spaces to watch the 3×3 matrix carry a colour into XYZ

A working space's primaries and white point fix one 3×3 matrix from linear RGB to XYZ. Wider primaries (ProPhoto) reach more of the diagram than narrow ones (sRGB).

Pick a working space to see its matrix, then slide the linear R, G, B amounts. The product is read out as XYZ and projected to a chromaticity (x, y); the swatch shows the colour.
